calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

SAMER KDANFOURA, Esq. for Plaintiff: SOPHIE LAU.
Plaintiff's Witness SOPHIE LAU was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant SAMARIA PERALTA, KRYSTAL YEN TA, CHEUKKI HUEN AKA KI HUEN.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

DAMAGES - $89,750.00
ATTY FEES - 4885.38
COSTS - 505.00
PROCESS SERV FEES - 75.00
TOTAL - $95,215.38

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-04-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JUDY C. TSAI, TEL. NO. (408) 441-7800, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. JUDY TSAI'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS KRYSTAL TA AND CHEUKKI HUEN IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING MOTION. THE COURT WAS PRESENTED A PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH WAS PERSONALLY SERVED ON THE CLIENT BUT STILL INSUFFICIENT NOTICE ON THE OTHER COUNSEL; BASED ON SERVICE BY MAIL ON FEBRUARY 2, 2011, THE EARLIEST HEARING DATE WOULD HAVE BEEN MARCH 7, 2011.
